owner: Inner Cosmos Psychology Capability Working Group

description.zh-CN: 把情境、感受、身体信号和需要分开看看，不给你贴标签。
description.en-SG: Separate the situation, feelings, body signals and needs without labelling you.

limitations.zh-CN: 这是一次反思练习，不评估心理疾病，也不能替代专业支持。情绪命名对不同人和情境的作用不同。
limitations.en-SG: This is a reflection exercise, not a mental-health assessment or professional support. Affect labelling may work differently across people and contexts.
